title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Quarterly Report of Interest Rates on Selected Direct Consumer Installment Loans and the Quarterly Report of Credit Card Plans (FR 2835 and FR 2835a; OMB No. 7100-0085).
action: On November 14, 2023, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (88 FR 78025) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 2835 and FR 2835a. The comment period for this notice expired on January 16, 2024. The Board received one comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2024-07091
